ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT YANG WANG ON MAR-02-2022 - CONTINUED TO APR-26-2022 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 FOR LETTER. THERESIA SANDHU, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF PEPERDINE UNIVERSITY. DEFENDANT YANG WANG WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH, BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. MS. WANG REQUIRES THE ASSISTANCE OF A MANDARIN IN ORDER TO PROCEED WITH TODAY'S EXAMINATION, BUT UNFORTUNATELY ONE IS NOT AVAILABLE THIS AFTERNOON. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. OEX PERSONALLY SERVED ON MS. WANG ON 10/27/2022. BENCH LETTER ISSUED 01/12/2022 SHALL REISSUE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION APR-26-2022 AS TO DEFENDANT YAN WANG - THERESIA SANDHU, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF PEPPERDINE UNIVERSITY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT YANG WANG. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. OEX PERSONALLY SERVED ON DEFENDANT YANG WANG ON 10/27/2022. BENCH LETTER ISSUED 01/12/2022. BENCH LETTER REISSUED 03/02/2022. COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER AIDONG NI WAS PRESENT TO ASSIST MS. YANG DURING THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. BENCH WARRANT SHALL ISSUE WITH BAIL SET AT $500.00. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION OCT-31-2019 - DISCHARGED PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT LOCAL RULE 8.9E AS TO DEFENDANT YANG WANG. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
